use_cases: Animated background effect for landing pages and hero sections
Dynamic color spectrum visual for portfolio and showcase sites
Decorative animated element for SaaS dashboards
Visual spectrum display for media and entertainment platforms
ai_summary: CosmicSpectrum is an animated color gradient component featuring multiple preset themes (original, blue-pink, sunset, purple, monochrome, etc.) with GSAP-powered transitions. It includes a configurable blur effect and dark/light theme detection for automatic styling. Primarily designed as a decorative animated background element for landing pages, hero sections, and visual showcases.
